instructions.instruction: Apply KISS: choose the simplest design that solves the actual problem
Apply YAGNI: do not build for imagined future requirements
instructions.relevant_when: Tempted to add configurability or extension points now

instructions.instruction: Apply DRY to knowledge, not just characters: dedupe a single source of truth
instructions.relevant_when: The same decision/rule is encoded in several places

instructions.instruction: Avoid premature abstraction: prefer duplication until the shape is clear
instructions.relevant_when: Two similar pieces of code appear
